INPUT | Sheet1!C3 | "Definition: Percentage of women who never had intercourse"
MERGE | Sheet1!C3:D3 | true
INPUT | Sheet1!E3 | "Definition: Percentage of women who were sexually activity in the four weeks preceding the survey"
MERGE | Sheet1!E3:F3 | true
INPUT | Sheet1!G3 | "Definition: Percentage of women using a modern contraceptive method, disaggregated by current marriage status, sexual activity, and age"

INPUT | Sheet1!L3 | "Definition: Percentage of women using a traditiol contraceptive method, disaggregated by current marriage status, sexual activity, and age"

INPUT | Sheet1!Q3 | "Definition: Percentage of women with an unmet need for family planning, disaggregated by marital status, sexual activity, and age"

FONT_COLOR | Sheet1!Q3:Q4 | #FFFFFF
INPUT | Sheet1!W3 | "Definition:  Total demand for family planning is the sum of unmet need for family planning and those currently using family planning, disaggregated by marital status"
MERGE | Sheet1!W3:Z3 | true
FONT_COLOR | Sheet1!W3:W4 | #FFFFFF
INPUT | Sheet1!AA3 | "Definition: Percentage of young women age 15-24 who reported using a condom at last sexual intercourse, of all young women who had sex with more than one partner in the 12 months preceding the survey"
FONT_COLOR | Sheet1!AA3:AD4 | #FFFFFF
INPUT | Sheet1!AB3 | "Definition: Percentage of currently married or in union women currently using any modern method of contraception"
INPUT | Sheet1!AC3 | "Definition: Percentage of currently married or in union women currently using any traditiol method of contraception"
INPUT | Sheet1!AD3 | "Definition: Percentage of currently married or in union women with an unmet need for family planning"

INPUT | Sheet1!A89 | "** Based on DHS's defintion of unmarried sexually active (unmarried and had sex in the last month)."
